Sign The Norfolk Way petition to save our Norfolk Way of Life

Norfolk is a proud rural county. Our rural way of life, rural economy and local communities rely on farming, food production and distribution for its prosperity.  

The new Labour Government’s Family FarmTax, Small Business JobsTax and wider Tax plans will hammer an already fragile rural economy.  

All of us in Norfolk who care need to take a stand and speak with one voice. 

Join us by signing our petition here:

You can read my policy on how I handle your data here.

Thank you for signing this petition.

CAPTCHA
Get new captcha!
Enter the characters shown in the image.
This question is for testing whether or not you are a human visitor and to prevent automated spam submissions.

George Freeman MP
Rooms 333-335
Breckland Business Centre
St Withburga Lane
Dereham
Norfolk, NR19 1FD

Telephone:
01953 600617

email:
george.freeman.mp@parliament.uk


Breckland District: All Saints, Buckenham, Burgh and Haverscroft, Dereham Central, Dereham Humbletoft, Dereham Neatherd, Dereham Toftwood, Eynsford, Haggard De Toni, Hermitage, Launditch, Necton, Queen's, Shipdham, Springvale and Scarning, Swanton Morley, Taverner, Templar, Two Rivers, Upper Wensum, Upper Yare, Watton, and Wissey; South Norfolk District: Abbey, Cromwells, Hingham and Deopham, Northfields, Rustens, Town, and Wicklewood.
